title: Lyndon LaRouche: The Significance of the Current Crisis in the U.S. for Europe
description:
Speech by Lyndon LaRouche, U.S. Economist and Statesman, at the International Schiller Institute conference in Rüsselsheim, Germany, July 2-3, 2011. LaRouche spoke as part of the panel on "Imminent Disintegration of the World Financial System or Enactment of the Glass-Steagall Act?"

http://schillerinstitut.com

Read LaRouche's report on the conference - "Our Day's Darkest Hours": http://larouchepac.com/node/18658
